info.title: 🏢 University Housing System API
info.description: Complete API documentation for University Housing System with all endpoints

post.description: Submit a new housing application (Student only)

400.description: Validation error or active application already exists

patch.description: Approve a housing application and assign room (Admin only)

get.description: List all users with pagination and filtering (Admin only)
Returns the profile picture of the user as an image stream.

delete.description: Delete a user and their data (Admin only)

get.description: Returns limited essential building details for students. Non-students receive full details including floors and supervisor references.
Returns limited essential building details for students. Non-students receive computed building stats (room counts/capacity) and supervisor connections.

delete.description: Sets building status to 'inactive' and its rooms to 'maintenance' without removing data from the database.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique ID of the building to deactivate

get.description: Returns a list of rooms. Excludes current occupant listings and detailed supervisor attributes for students.
Get list of available rooms for assignment
Retrieves the room profile. For students, it limits properties and hides the identities of occupants and supervisor.

post.description: Submit transfer, leave, vacate, or maintenance request (Student only)

toRoomId.description: Required for transfer requests (Target room ID)

get.description: Retrieve housing requests. Students see only their own, Admins/Supervisors see all.
Retrieve specific request details (Owner or Admin only)

patch.description: Edit a pending housing request (Student only)

404.description: Request not found or not pending

patch.description: Approve or reject housing request with optional manual room assignment (Admin only)

overrideRoomId.description: Optional: Admin can choose a different room ID than the one requested by the student

get.description: Retrieve meal menu for a specific date

post.description: Add new meal to menu (Admin/Meal Admin only)
Book a meal for the current day (Student only)
Scan a student's QR code to record attendance (Supervisor/Admin only)

qrCodeString.description: The scanned QR code string (student's user ID)

buildingId.description: Optional: building ID where the scan is taking place. If omitted, assigned room's building is used.

400.description: Invalid QR code, or already recorded for today

get.description: Get attendance records for current student

400.description: Validation error or report not open

content.example: The water supply will be cut off for maintenance on Friday from 10 AM to 2 PM.

delete.description: Cancel an active meal booking (Student only)

post.description: Generate QR codes for attendance and meals (Student only)
Generate new QR codes and deactivate old ones (Student only)

get.description: Retrieve current QR codes for attendance and meals (Student only)
Verify a scanned QR code (Admin/Supervisor only)

404.description: Invalid QR code or student not found
